title: sticherus pseudoscandens
intro: Sticherus pseudoscandens is a type of fern plant that belongs to the family Gleicheniaceae, native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sticherus pseudoscandens include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or ointments, and it can also be dried and powdered for use in capsules or tablets.
